characters.appearance: A middle-aged South Asian man, likely in his 40s or 50s, with a heavy build. He has a dark complexion, short, dark, slightly curly hair, and a prominent, thick black mustache. His facial expression is serious and focused.
characters.wardrobe: A light brown or tan short-sleeved polo shirt.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman, likely in her early 20s, with a slender build. She has a fair complexion, long, straight, center-parted black hair, and dark eyes. Her features are soft and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A black top with white floral or leaf-patterned embroidery around the V-neckline.
characters.demeanor: Initially pained and confused, she becomes curious, thoughtful, and finally optimistic and happy.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: [Sipping sound]
Character A says: What happened?
Character B says: I got a burning tongue.
Character A says: It's 'burnt tongue', not 'burning tongue'.
Character B says: What?
Character A says: 'Burning tongue' is a medical condition. 'Burnt tongue' is when you burn your tongue drinking hot tea.
Character B says: Okay, okay, my English is just weak. I freeze when I have to speak.
Character A says: Then you should practice with Miss Nova on the Supernova app.
Character B says: An AI teacher? But how can AI teach me?
Character A says: She doesn't teach everyone the same way. She understands your level first, then makes a personalized plan just for you.
Character B says: But I make so many mistakes...
Character A says: That's the best part! Make 1000 mistakes, she corrects you 1000 times without judging. And she explains the logic in your own language.
Character B says: Is it expensive? I don't have much time either.
Character A says: It's way cheaper than coaching classes, and you only need 15 minutes a day. Over 1 crore Indians are already learning to speak confidently.
Character B says: Wow! How do I join?
Character A says: Click the install button, download Supernova, and start speaking English today!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Relatable English error (burning vs burnt tongue) corrected live.
- Payload: Introduces Miss Nova, hitting personalization (a) and privacy/no-judgment (b).
- Close: Positive time anchor (15 mins) and comparative cost, ending with a clean CTA without a 15-day guarantee.

payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Split-screen vendor/learner format and the 'burning tongue' error hook.
payload_audit.price_check: No hard rupee figure; used comparative 'cheaper than coaching classes'.
